evals.prompt: I want to build a backend API for a mobile app. Help me work through the key decisions.
evals.expected_output: The skill should use AskUserQuestion to present bounded options for forking decisions (e.g., language/runtime, auth strategy, data storage, deployment target). Should ask one fork at a time, adapt based on prior answers, and end with a structured restatement of decisions made.

evals.prompt: We're about to deploy our app to production. Walk me through the deployment decisions we need to make.
evals.expected_output: The skill should surface deployment forks (e.g., platform choice, rollback strategy, traffic cutover, secret management) as AskUserQuestion calls with 2-4 options each. Options should explain consequences, not just definitions. Should converge on a restatement of the deployment plan.

evals.prompt: I'm planning a notifications feature — push, email, in-app. Help me decide the architecture.
evals.expected_output: The skill should identify decision forks in a notifications system (delivery channels, delivery guarantees, unsubscribe model, storage of notification history) and present each as a bounded AskUserQuestion. Should use multi-select where multiple choices can coexist and single-select where options are mutually exclusive.
